title: leucanthemum ircutianum var. amplifolium
intro: Leucanthemum ircutianum var. amplifolium, also known as the Korean Mountain Daisy or White Pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Leucanthemum ircutianum var. amplifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tea, tincture, and essential oil forms, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
